reviews.review_description:
No point to the game.
Simply a less quality version of other games on meta. You can't even leave the "squid game" mode.

i love the game 



so much

Just add marbles and rock paper scissors minus one ,six legged pentathlon, and nerf glass bridge the less amount of players the less amount of tiles dalgonas a bit buggy but I liked how you added a square
Tug of war love to see it
Red light green light just fix the carry mechanism 
Glass bridge perfect
Don’t know if squid game is there didn’t make it
Mingle challenging but fun
Keys and knifes perfect but a bit hard to kill and find keys

Jump rope good but only have one gap in the track 
 And not sure if there’s sky squid game



Things I would like to see is to rebel that would be sick make it just like ink game

A nightmare mode

This game has just been launched but it is already so good. I know this game will do well and I cant wait to see what is next! I am one of the beta testers for this game so if you have any questions or ideas, remember you can talk to me.
Discord username: mellowpede [alt btw]
On the new squid game update there was ￼some bugs like at lights out my game glitched and everyone teleported except for me I just stayed and I had to restart my game.￼￼

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind review! If you dont teleport through to the next game it is most likely a bug due to your internet. Thanks for playing Monkathon!

reviews.review_description: Edivence(owner) gave me a smooch!! But all jokes aside this game is amazing and it’s by far the best squid game experience I’ve ever had it’s very fun to play with people and it’s just over all a great experience

reviews.review_title: SUCH A GOOD GAME 10/10 TELL YOUR FAMILY
reviews.review_description: i love it so much make sure that everyone in your family buys a headset and gets this game. please gimme server mod cutie edi 😍😍😍
This game is really fun and lots of things to do
Game needs some work, but it’s great.

reviews.review_title: I love It It’s So Hot
reviews.review_description: 5 Stars For Flashbang 10 stars For Edivence and 10000 stars for the game
